final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a female streamer (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a Douyin livestream interface aesthetic — exact UI details and visual treatment are yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical format, must include livestream interface elements (comments, viewer count, gift buttons, etc.)
Subject: must include a female streamer (神仙姐姐) holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: must be a livestream room setting
Lighting/mood: needs a livestream studio lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign the streamer is holding
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be 9:16 aspect ratio; must include typical Douyin livestream UI elements (弹幕, viewer count, interactive buttons)
Avoid:
